calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Amendments To Trust; Confirm Trustee; Confirm Assets; And Confirm Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sasha Ganji for and with Debra Jones. Sonya Jones and Lolita Wilkins also present.

The court stated that this matter had been continued to see if there was any additional information or documents regarding the interlineations on the trust instrument. Mr. Ganji stated that there is nothing additional, that there have been no objections and that the family just wants a decision. The court stated that its decision is to deny the request to confirm the amendments and will grant the balance of the petition. The petition for an order to confirm validity of trust, etc., was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Amendments To Trust; Confirm Trustee; Confirm Assets; And Confirm Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Continued To Jun-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sasha Ganji for and with Debra Jones. Sonya Jones, Phillip Jones & Tamara Jones also present.

The Court stated that we are to determine if certain interlineations on the trust document qualify as a duly executed instrument, that we do not have Rhonda Jones here who would be the most affected person and asked if there were any objections. Mr. Jones stated that he objects. The Court stated that there are no objections in writing, that it is concerned that the changes are not a valid way to do so, and that it will continue this hearing for objections to be filed and to give Rhonda Jones a chance to be present. Ms. Tamara Jones stated that her father (Mr. Jones) does not know what he is objecting to and that he received notice through her as he does not have a permanent address. The court suggested that Mr. Jones speak with Mr. Ganji to determine if his objections are valid. The Petition for and Order to Confirm Validity of trust, etc., was continued to June 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any objections must be in writing, filed with the court by June 3, 2015 and courtesy copies are to be delivered to the court and copies are to be sent to all parties.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Lopes & Santiago. (Not Reported)
